context:
Evaluating a Coralogix support response for this user question:

I need to parse a timestamp string from attributes["event_time"] and set the log timestamp from it. Can OTTL change the event timestamp, and what should I watch out for?

checklist.name: explains-whether-timestamp-mutation-is-suppor
checklist.description: Explains whether timestamp mutation is supported in the relevant log context, shows a concrete parsing approach, and warns about format/timezone mismatch or invalid values.
